bh.shot_strategy: On Hole 1, with a N/A wind, a RHBH with a Stable Fairway Driver on a hyzer is recommended to control the flight and avoid OB. Be mindful of the OB: Out Of Bounds. Be aware of: Safety: Fairway Cross (on the way to hole A).

fh.shot_strategy: For a RHFH on Hole 1, a Stable Midrange thrown with a slight anhyzer is advised to counter the N/A wind. Be mindful of the OB: Out Of Bounds. Be aware of: Safety: Fairway Cross (on the way to hole A).

bh.shot_strategy: A LHBH on Hole 1 using an Understable Midrange with a slight anhyzer can help manage the N/A wind. Be mindful of the OB: Out Of Bounds. Be aware of: Safety: Fairway Cross (on the way to hole A).

fh.shot_strategy: On Hole 1, a LHFH with a Stable Driver thrown with anhyzer can help manage the N/A wind. Be mindful of the OB: Out Of Bounds. Be aware of: Safety: Fairway Cross (on the way to hole A).
